mapper.insert: insert into soultalk.agent(name, creator, create_time, pub, prompt, introduction, photo, api) values (#{name}, #{creator}, #{createTime}, #{pub}, #{prompt}, #{introduction}, #{photo}, #{api})
mapper.update: update soultalk.agent set name = #{name}, introduction = #{introduction}, creator = #{creator}, create_time = #{createTime}, pub = #{pub}, model = #{model}, prompt = #{prompt}, api = #{api}, photo = #{photo} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from soultalk.agent where creator = #{userId} or pub = 1
select * from soultalk.agent where name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
